title: The Strange Package
content: Oliver found a small package on his doorstep with no name attached. It was carefully wrapped in brown paper and tied with string. Unsure who had sent it, he asked his neighbors, but nobody recognized it. Later that afternoon, a delivery driver returned and apologized. The package had been left at the wrong house by mistake. Inside was a birthday gift for someone living next door. The mystery ended with laughter and a successful delivery.
